properties.sql: SELECT a.id, a.c_full_name AS full_name, a.c_national_id AS national_id, COALESCE(r.c_name, a.c_applied_programme) AS applied_programme, a.c_district AS district, CASE WHEN length(coalesce(a.c_eligibility_outcome, '')) > 0 THEN (a.c_eligibility_outcome::jsonb)->>'disposition' ELSE NULL END AS disposition, CASE WHEN length(coalesce(a.c_eligibility_outcome, '')) > 0 THEN (a.c_eligibility_outcome::jsonb)->>'score' ELSE NULL END AS score, CASE WHEN length(coalesce(a.c_eligibility_outcome, '')) > 0 THEN (a.c_eligibility_outcome::jsonb)->>'failedRule' ELSE NULL END AS failed_rule, a.c_decision AS decision, a.c_status AS status FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration r ON r.c_code = a.c_applied_programme ORDER BY a.datemodified DESC NULLS LAST

properties.label: Approve Selected
properties.confirmation: Approve all selected applications? Each will be moved to status=approved with audit + budget event.

properties.label: Reject Selected
properties.confirmation: Reject all selected applications? Each will be moved to status=rejected with audit + budget release.
